records.text: Sm(1) is bonded to two equivalent O(1) and four equivalent O(2) atoms to form HfO6 octahedra that share corners with six equivalent Sm(1)O6 octahedra and corners with eight equivalent Sr(1)O4 tetrahedra. The corner-sharing octahedral tilt angles range from 45-47°. Both Sm(1)-O(1) bond lengths are 2.12 Å. There are two shorter (2.08 Å) and two longer (2.09 Å) Sm(1)-O(2) bond lengths. Sr(1) is bonded to two equivalent O(1) and two equivalent O(2) atoms to form distorted CoO4 tetrahedra that share corners with eight equivalent Sm(1)O6 octahedra and corners with two equivalent Sr(1)O4 tetrahedra. The corner-sharing octahedral tilt angles range from 65-82°. There is one shorter (2.07 Å) and one longer (2.18 Å) Sr(1)-O(1) bond length. Both Sr(1)-O(2) bond lengths are 2.03 Å. There are two inequivalent O sites. In the first O site, O(1) is bonded to two equivalent Sm(1) and two equivalent Sr(1) atoms to form distorted corner-sharing OHf2Co2 tetrahedra. In the second O site, O(2) is bonded in a distorted trigonal planar geometry to two equivalent Sm(1) and one Sr(1) atom.

Tc(1) is bonded to twelve equivalent O(1) atoms to form BaO12 cuboctahedra that share corners with twelve equivalent Tc(1)O12 cuboctahedra, faces with six equivalent Tc(1)O12 cuboctahedra, and faces with eight equivalent Tb(1)O6 octahedra. All Tc(1)-O(1) bond lengths are 2.83 Å. Tb(1) is bonded to six equivalent O(1) atoms to form CuO6 octahedra that share corners with six equivalent Tb(1)O6 octahedra and faces with eight equivalent Tc(1)O12 cuboctahedra. The corner-sharing octahedra are not tilted. All Tb(1)-O(1) bond lengths are 2.00 Å. O(1) is bonded to four equivalent Tc(1) and two equivalent Tb(1) atoms to form a mixture of distorted edge, face, and corner-sharing OBa4Cu2 octahedra. The corner-sharing octahedral tilt angles range from 0-60°.

Zr(1) is bonded in a 8-coordinate geometry to two equivalent O(2) and six equivalent O(1) atoms. There is one shorter (2.35 Å) and one longer (2.44 Å) Zr(1)-O(2) bond length. There are a spread of Zr(1)-O(1) bond distances ranging from 2.39-2.71 Å. Er(1) is bonded to two equivalent O(2) and four equivalent O(1) atoms to form corner-sharing CrO6 octahedra. The corner-sharing octahedral tilt angles are 27°. Both Er(1)-O(2) bond lengths are 1.98 Å. There are two shorter (1.99 Å) and two longer (2.00 Å) Er(1)-O(1) bond lengths. There are two inequivalent O sites. In the first O site, O(1) is bonded in a 5-coordinate geometry to three equivalent Zr(1) and two equivalent Er(1) atoms. In the second O site, O(2) is bonded in a 4-coordinate geometry to two equivalent Zr(1) and two equivalent Er(1) atoms.
